summary: Completed the i18n hardcoded-VN plan: fixed vi.json syntax (missing staffApprovals opener), added admin namespaces (adminDashboard, adminContracts, adminUsers, adminWalletLedger, adminSalesHistory, adminDisputes, adminNotifications, adminAuditLogs, adminBiddingRules, adminFinancialPolicies) and expanded adminAuctionHistory/adminRevenue. Wired useTranslations across all ~12 admin pages plus revenue summary cards. Patched remaining user-page strings (dashboard ended sessions, kyc OCR/photo errors, won-items PDF, auction-room countdown). npm run build passes.
current_status: Frontend i18n migration is complete per plan scope: shared components, user pages, /luxe with LanguageSwitcher, seller shell, admin portal with sidebar i18n, support/WalletCard, valid en.json/vi.json, and successful production build. API/backend error messages intentionally unchanged; some ancillary pages (auth marketing, inventory, earnings, useLuxuryHomeCopy on /browse) may still contain localized copy by design or lower priority.
